description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to sync and update all git submodules recursively. Add a build_nodejs job that changes to the nodejs directory, replaces the placeholder HOME with CI_PROJECT_DIR in build-nodejs.sh using sed, and executes the script with sh. Add a build_wget job that changes to the wget directory, performs the same sed replacement in build-wget.sh, and runs it with sh. Both jobs run in the default stage and have no additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
